corrections.note: Printed text reads singular ἠθροίσθη, not plural ἠθροίσθησαν.
Initial eta has rough breathing/accent in print; rest of abbreviation as transcribed.
No parenthesis before στρωμεν in the printed apparatus.

uncertain.note: The superscript after λ appears like a small alpha in the scan, but exact form of the abbreviation is slightly unclear.

notes: Running head and page number match. Body is otherwise consistent with the scan; left-margin numbers 38–47 are correctly represented as verse numbers in the body, not stray line numbers. Apparatus mostly matches, with a few minor transcription issues.
